positive: A minimalist, highly stylized abstract representation of a mountain range at dawn. The scene features crisp, geometric silhouettes of layered peaks emerging from a gradient sky. The palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, warm yellow, and charcoal grey. Focus on strong negative space and clean lines. Style: Flat design, vector illustration, woodcut etching aesthetic. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, perfect for textile printing. Lighting: Backlit, emphasizing silhouette and crisp edges. Print details: Seamless pattern potential, scalable artwork, high contrast.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grainy, low resolution, poor quality
